Author: Craig Collins
UsageNotes: Show a list of Purchase Orders for selection when posting. Once you choose a purchase order, the details of the items to be posted will be displayed. After POST successful a label will be added to the LabelPrintQueue, see implementation notes.
ImplementationNotes: Please update the ERP_ReceiptHeader view to point to your ERP system. Additionally, the PrescriptReceivingPostStep200 stored procedure requires the bartender label named RECEIPTCONFIRMLIVE.BTW, based on the SQL view Label_ReceiptSummary.

ProcessStepMetadata.Name: Step200
ProcessStepMetadata.Description: Insert Confirm Label to Print in Receiving

Name: RECEIVINGPOST_LOOKUP
Description:
RECEIVINGPOST_LOOKUP

Show a list of Purchase Orders for selection when posting. Once you choose a purchase order, the details of the items to be posted will be displayed. After POST successful a label will be added to the LabelPrintQueue, see implementation notes.

Please update the ERP_ReceiptHeader view to point to your ERP system. Additionally, the PrescriptReceivingPostStep200 stored procedure requires the bartender label named RECEIPTCONFIRMLIVE.BTW, based on the SQL view Label_ReceiptSummary.
